title: PixelY4 Result
description: Returns the Y (Y4) coordinate position for corner points of rectangles detected in a pixel coordinate system.
notes: The pixel coordinates for the four corners of a rectangle can be retrieved as Pixel X1, 2, 3, 4 results and Pixel Y1, 2, 3, 4 results.  PixelY4 is used to retrieve the Y coordinate for the Corner4 point shown in the diagram below.
